analysis: Comprehensive input-length control on remaining data

findings.note: Paper claims AUROC=0.118 (benign on abliterated). Our LOO gives 0.412. Neither is meaningful. Abliteration does NOT create detectable geometry on benign content, as the paper claims.
Same input-length confound as exp18b. Abliterated model deception is the same artifact.
Same data as exp31 refusal. Confirms refusal detection survives input control even with extended feature set.
Features are nearly identical across RTX 3090 and H200 (r > 0.994 for all features). Hardware invariance claim is CONFIRMED, though trivially expected for BF16 inference.
